title: tenageia ranaria
intro: Tenageia ranaria, also known as Ranania tenageia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Tenageia ranaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create tonics and ointments.
